title: Fanir
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Image}}
'''Fanir''' was a group of two [[Cargo ferry|cargo ferries]] belonging to [[Airam (group)|Airam]] weapon smugglers. They were to meet with [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] cargo ferry group [[Rongo]] to deliver their cargo of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] munitions at the [[Ytha'ac Cluster/Legends|Ytha'ac Cluster]] in the [[Ytha'ac system]]. However, the Imperials had sent a strike force consisting of [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] and [[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport|''Gamma''-class ATR-6 assault transports]] to recover the munitions. The smugglers dropped the cargo for Rongo to pick up and then quickly jumped into hyperspace.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]''
